message: Initialized compliance and IAP planning artifacts before implementation.
Implemented ATT, permission keys, protocol WebView, relative media storage, upload, and album export.
Implemented 27-product Store, lazy IAP service, idempotent credit ledger, global balance entry, and fixed 10-credit spend point.
Static analysis, tests, and iOS simulator build passed.
Compliance tracker, IAP tracker, test matrix, feature coverage, and layout audit updated.

Fixed iOS simulator launch crash by moving Flutter plugin registration to SceneDelegate, replacing the crashing ATT plugin with a native MethodChannel, and restoring Runner resource packaging for Assets.car and storyboards.
Final simulator launch reached the Line Board screen with Runner PID 95035 active and no SIGSEGV or missing-icon log matches in the final narrow query.
Archived both requested SKILL.md files in full original form and documented the two follow-up documentation change rounds in the project review.
